headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include Ross Stores, Suzano, Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, Globe Life and AMETEK
summary: High-ROE stocks are in focus as market volatility rises, with five companies highlighted for profitability, earnings growth or consistent performance.
